phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para entradas combinadas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah en-TRAH-dahs kohm-bee-NAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto a la Puerta de Ramos, a la
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH RAH-mohs AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: In the square, facing the new cathedral.

responses.english: In the square, facing the new cathedral.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH RAH-mohs AH LAH
responses.french: Junto a la Puerta de Ramos, a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo alquilar la audioguía en español?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWAY-so ahl-kee-LAHR lah ow-dee-oh-GEE-ah en es-pah-NYOHL?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: The audio guide desk is on the right.

responses.english: The audio guide desk is on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tower climb entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es la entrada para subir a la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh ehs lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah soo-BEER ah lah TOH-rreh?

likely_response.local: La entrada a la torre está al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH TOHR-reh EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: The tower entrance is at the back.

responses.english: The tower entrance is at the back.
responses.phonetic: LAH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH TOHR-reh EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: La entrada a la torre está al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets for the tower climb
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar la entrada para la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohm-PRAHR lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah lah TOH-rreh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, a su derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH SOO deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, on your right.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, on your right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH SOO deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla principal, a su derecha.
